sections.paragraph:
f. constr. עַצְּבַת (as if from עַצְּבָה), pl. constr. עַצְּבֹות, with suff. עַצְּבֹותַי, עַצְּבֹותָם.

(1) an idol, Psa 16:4.

(2) pain-(a) of body, Job 9:28.-(b) of mind, Psa 147:3, מְחַבֵּשׁ לְעַצְּבֹותָם “he binds up their pains,” the wounds of their minds; Pro 10:10 with the addition of לֵב Pro 15:13.
